tweets.title: Third visit of NSA Ajit Doval in 5 months to Saudi Arabia:
tweets.content:
Third visit of NSA Ajit Doval in 5 months to Saudi Arabia:

India in Saudi Arabia (@IndianEmbRiyadh)

Hon'ble NSA Shri Ajit Doval paid an official visit to Riyadh on 20 July.

He was warmly received at the airport by H.E. Dr. Saud Al-Sati, Deputy Minister for Political Affairs, @KSAmofaEN, and Ambassador Dr. Suhel Khan.

During the visit, the NSA met H.R.H. Prince Abdulaziz bin Salman, Minister of Energy @MoEnergy_Saudi ; H.H. Prince Faisal bin Farhan, Minister of Foreign Affairs; and H.E. Dr. Musaed Al-Aiban, National Security Advisor.

The meetings reviewed the progress in India–Saudi bilateral relations and discussed the current regional situation, as well as other issues of mutual interest.

@PMOIndia
@MEAIndia @IndianDiplomacy

— https://nitter.net/IndianEmbRiyadh/status/2079534903826223262#m
tweets.author: @sidhant

tweets.title: Around 50 police personnel were reportedly injured today, some critically. A roughly similar number of civilians were also injured. I have a few requests for Delhi Police, the Home Ministry, and other concerned agencies: • Identify those involved who were not students. The agencies have the tools to do this quickly. Please exercise restraint with genuine students and avoid indiscriminate cases against them. • Anyone associated with political parties who participated in unlawful activity should be identified and prosecuted strictly according to law. • Publish an official, verified tally of injuries, arrests, and detentions. There is already a massive wave of propaganda and conflicting claims.
tweets.content:
Around 50 police personnel were reportedly injured today, some critically. A roughly similar number of civilians were also injured.

I have a few requests for Delhi Police, the Home Ministry, and other concerned agencies:

• Identify those involved who were not students. The agencies have the tools to do this quickly. Please exercise restraint with genuine students and avoid indiscriminate cases against them.

• Anyone associated with political parties who participated in unlawful activity should be identified and prosecuted strictly according to law.

• Publish an official, verified tally of injuries, arrests, and detentions. There is already a massive wave of propaganda and conflicting claims.

tweets.title: Come on, be responsible with what you post. We expect maturity from educators, at least. That’s a QRT, or Quick Reaction Team (evident from the vehicle). A QRT responds to any kind of threat that needs to be neutralised and contained immediately, as the name suggests. They are following their SOPs to secure the gate. It doesn’t matter whether protestors are coming through or terrorists. Major installations have multiple QRTs assigned to different yet specific tasks. Kindly cross-check such things before you post, either with your friends in the police/armed forces or with people who have subject-matter knowledge. You know that a post like this can fuel unnecessary distrust among less-informed people.
tweets.content:
Come on, be responsible with what you post. We expect maturity from educators, at least.

That’s a QRT, or Quick Reaction Team (evident from the vehicle). A QRT responds to any kind of threat that needs to be neutralised and contained immediately, as the name suggests.

They are following their SOPs to secure the gate. It doesn’t matter whether protestors are coming through or terrorists.

Major installations have multiple QRTs assigned to different yet specific tasks.

Kindly cross-check such things before you post, either with your friends in the police/armed forces or with people who have subject-matter knowledge.

You know that a post like this can fuel unnecessary distrust among less-informed people.

amit kilhor (@amitkilhor)

Will they shoot at the Indians?

tweets.title: Yes, dependence on the Israeli OEM for certain radar modes is a legitimate concern, and ideally the aircraft should have received the Uttam AESA from the outset. However, Uttam is planned for Batch 2, where it is also expected to feature GaN technology. Hopefully, once Virupaksha matures, we will see a GaN-based “steering” AESA transition for the Tejas Mk2 production standard as well. That said, taunts like “hangar beauty” should be taken on the chin. Manufacturing and capability development is difficult to process for those who aren’t associated with the domain. Let the import bahadurs win today’s narrative so India can win more important war of Atmanirbharta. A year from now, the picture will likely look very different.
tweets.content:
Yes, dependence on the Israeli OEM for certain radar modes is a legitimate concern, and ideally the aircraft should have received the Uttam AESA from the outset. However, Uttam is planned for Batch 2, where it is also expected to feature GaN technology. Hopefully, once Virupaksha matures, we will see a GaN-based “steering” AESA transition for the Tejas Mk2 production standard as well.

That said, taunts like “hangar beauty” should be taken on the chin. Manufacturing and capability development is difficult to process for those who aren’t associated with the domain. Let the import bahadurs win today’s narrative so India can win more important war of Atmanirbharta.

A year from now, the picture will likely look very different.

Ramandeep Bajwa (@Ramandeep_Bajwa)

What do you mean by:

"This is exactly what I mean
when I say: build your own systems, retain control over them, and keep improving them on your own terms."

The platform on which Netra Mk1 is mounted is a Brazilian Embraer ERJ 145.
It is powered by American engines, the Rolls Royce North America AE 3007. There are numerous other parts in the aircraft which are made in USA.
How can we retain control over the supply of vital components if US blocks supply?
Only way to have total autonomy is to develop the platform inhouse.

Be like China. They make everything inhouse.

tweets.content:
At least one Netra Mk1 AEW&CS now features GaN-based transmit/receive modules, with the other two expected to be upgraded soon. The same technology is also making its way into the Tejas Mk1A.

This is exactly what I mean when I say: build your own systems, retain control over them, and keep improving them on your own terms.
